description_long: This is a single-story, L-shaped house with a combination of hip and flat roof sections. The main roof is a dark brown hip style, while a large, lighter gray flat roof covers an extended section, likely a carport or patio. The exterior walls are a neutral beige with several rectangular windows and a prominent front entry area beneath the overhang. The house features a wide, open area under the flat roof, supported by slender columns, suggesting a sheltered outdoor space. The overall design is low and sprawling, typical of mid-century ranch or suburban homes, with a focus on horizontal lines and functional outdoor living.
description: A single-story, L-shaped house with a hip and flat roof, beige walls, and a large covered outdoor area. The design is low, wide, and emphasizes horizontal lines and open space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, several windows, and the large covered area supported by columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof section and the depth of the covered area extending back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long flat roof, open carport or patio, and minimal window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the open, column-supported area and the back of the hip roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry under a wide overhang, with a sheltered porch area and simple rectangular door.
